hero.title:
Simplicity in Code,
Clarity in design.
hero.subtitle: I build digital products that are easy to use, fast to load, and built to scale.

about: I am a first-year Computer Science student with a focus on frontend development and UI/UX design. I enjoy building clean and practical web interfaces that solve real problems.

I have worked on several personal projects, including e-commerce websites and experimental tools, focusing on performance, simplicity, and user experience. Currently, I’m improving my skills in JavaScript, React, and system design.

projects.title: Next Store
projects.desc: A simple e-commerce website focused on clean UI and smooth user experience. Includes product listing, filtering, and WhatsApp-based ordering system.

projects.title: Portify
projects.desc: An experimental tool that generates portfolio websites automatically using predefined layouts and AI-generated content.

projects.title: FPS Game Prototype
projects.desc: A first-person shooter prototype focused on movement, shooting mechanics, and smooth player experience.
